title: aeroflare-ci configuration
description: Configuration for aeroflare-ci: build Nix flake installables and push them to OCI caches. Every build is pushed to every cache.

builds.description: Nix flake installables to build. The entry 'all' expands to every packages.<system>.*, devShells.<system>.* and nixosConfigurations.<host> the flake in the working directory exposes for the running system, and may be mixed with explicit installables.

signing-key.description: Path to a signing key, or the NAME of an environment variable holding the key material. Unsigned when omitted.

release-repo.description: GitHub repository the GitHub Action downloads the aeroflare-ci release asset from, as 'owner/repo'. Read by the Action's install step only; aeroflare-ci itself ignores it.

release-version.description: Release the GitHub Action downloads, with or without a leading 'v', or 'latest' for the newest release in release-repo. Defaults to the version the pinned action ref declares. Read by the Action's install step only.

skip-attestation.description: Skip SLSA provenance verification of the downloaded asset. Only for repositories that publish no attestations — it disables a supply-chain check. Read by the Action's install step only.

upstream-cache.description: Upstream cache(s) whose paths are skipped, as a string or a list. Defaults to https://cache.nixos.org. An explicit value replaces the default rather than extending it, so list cache.nixos.org yourself if you still want it. Use 'none' (alone) to disable filtering.
